summary: Updated `open_questions.md` for iteration 3, growing it from 13 to 15 questions. The two additions target the specific ambiguities the requirements-completeness critic flagged after re-grounding in fresh discovery notes: (11) whether there's a distinct "Resume" action that hands the automatic loop back control without ending Define, versus Done being the only real exit — flagged major, since the drafted requirements' language ("until you resume or finish") implied a control that doesn't exist anywhere in the codebase and no precedent for it was found; and (7) what the paused view shows while a single-step re-run (Explore or Clarifying Questions) is still in flight, mirroring the already-answered multi-step restart case. Both carry an assumed default consistent with the existing patterns discovery turned up, and all 13 original questions carry forward unchanged.
